title: Visual WeChat auto-reply macro workflow
content: A reusable automation pattern is to combine a vision plugin and GUI control to monitor WeChat for a specific contact's new messages, then automatically reply. The described flow uses visual detection to identify whether contact '金鑫伟' has sent a new message and to locate the center of the chat input box, then performs click, type, and Enter actions to send a fixed reply. It also notes using a background task scheduler to run the check repeatedly without blocking, though the example changed the requested 5-second interval to 15 seconds.
